notes: SHIP v1.14.327 - Boot replaced with the PHANTOM ghost mascot (HANDOFF_phantom-ghost-boot.md, chat-Claude; SUPERSEDES the shelved HANDOFF_v1.14.325_boot CoreWeave globe/corridor boot - that one is NOT shipped). RE-TARGET NOTE: handoff was authored against HEAD=.324 / target .325, but live was already .326 (.324 header rename, .325 PLATFORMS art, .326 HANDOFF art - none touched the boot block), so NO code collision; re-targeted to .327 and re-confirmed all 4 anchors grep=1 at .326 before editing. plate.webp/plate-wide.webp retired (precache swapped to phantom-ghost.webp 1086x1448 VP8 141718b + transparent phantom-lockup.png 1792x533 RGBA 433302b; plate.webp was boot-only). Ghost floats on black (peBob) with a breathing cyan/violet aura (peBreathe) and drifting data motes (#pe-void canvas). Its two circuit eyes (#pe-eyes canvas, fills .pe-stage which shares the 1086x1448 art aspect so eyes map to fixed fractions L 0.370,0.385 cyan / R 0.605,0.385 violet) live-read GPU/PTX code - hex, registers, CUDA ops, H100/fp8/bf16 - streaming upward, newest line bright at a read bar, core pulsing; power-on flicker (peEyeOn). Chrome lockup image (FIELD INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM / PHANTOM / RACK-STACK-VERIFY), black knocked to alpha so no box, fades in below (peLockOn). Existing tap-anywhere enter + calibrated #pe-taphint reused unchanged; on tap pe-dive fades the ghost/lockup/aura (peGhostDive scale+fade + existing peDiveFade, grep-confirmed present) then #pe-flash covers -> launch(). Reduced-motion: motes off, eyes one static frame, no bob/aura/lockOn. Old .pe-platepic/.pe-plate CSS left dead (no element). Gates: node --check dct-ios.html x3 PASS, CSS brace-balance net-0, three-stamp .326->.327 lockstep, git diff surgical, working-tree LF (autocrlf normalizes on commit). Boot is UNIVERSAL (not rd-scoped, same as every boot ship since .49); ?legacy=1 app surfaces byte-identical (boot changes for legacy+redesign alike - owner ruled proceed universal). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, installed PWA portrait): ghost floats + eyes stream code (cyan L / violet R) + aura breathes + motes drift + lockup crisp with NO box/halo on black + TAP TO ENTER pulses; tap fades ghost+lockup then flashes into the app. ROLLBACK: restore the <picture> plate + plate precache lines + revert the CSS/JS/3 stamps + drop the 2 assets.
